title: Wheel Driver Subsystem Dynamic Attributes
description: Dynamic attributes of the wheel driver, driving rolling and steering of parts on connection points.

definition.description: Resource location of the subsystem model, pointing to the corresponding subsystem static attribute definition file.

connector.description: Name of the controlled connection point.

roll_speed_outputs.description: Rolling speed signal output channel and targets.

steering_angle_outputs.description: Steering angle signal output channel and targets.
